meta.title: 兴趣爱好深入
meta.description: Intermediate vocabulary and grammar for discussing hobbies in more depth: skill level, persistence, and progress.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급 취미 심화 어휘와 문형: 실력, 꾸준함, 발전.

explanation.en: 「擅长」(shàncháng) means "to be good at/skilled in".

questions.prompt: 「擅长」是什么意思？(What does 擅长 mean?)
「坚持」是什么意思？(What does 坚持 mean?)
「进步」是什么意思？(What does 进步 mean?)
「水平」是什么意思？(What does 水平 mean?)

explanation.en: 「会」usually refers to a learned skill, while 「能」often refers to ability or permission in general.
explanation.ko: 「会」는 보통 배워서 익힌 기술을 가리키고, 「能」은 능력이나 허가를 더 폭넓게 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 「能」和「会」的区别是什么？(What's the difference between 能 and 会?)
choices: 会常指学会的技能，能常指能力或允许

explanation.en: 「会」indicates a learned skill: 会弹钢琴 = "know how to play piano".
explanation.ko: 「会」는 배워서 익힌 기술을 나타내며 '会弹钢琴'은 '피아노를 칠 줄 안다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 我___弹钢琴，已经学了五年了。(I am able to/know how to play the piano, I've been learning for five years.)

explanation.en: 「可能」means "possibly", softening the statement of inability.

questions.prompt: 我今天有点累，___不能陪你去打球了。(I'm a bit tired today, I can't go play ball with you.)
我很___画画，从小就喜欢。(I'm very good at drawing, I've liked it since I was little.)
学习一门乐器需要___练习，不能三天打鱼两天晒网。(Learning an instrument requires persistent practice, you can't be inconsistent about it.)
经过一年的练习，我的游泳水平___了很多。(After a year of practice, my swimming level has improved a lot.)
我的中文___还不够高，需要继续努力。(My Chinese level is still not high enough, I need to keep working hard.)
虽然一开始很难，但是我没有___，一直在坚持。(Although it was hard at first, I didn't give up, I kept persisting.)
这个爱好让我___了很多新朋友。(This hobby has helped me make many new friends.)
每天练习半个小时，一年下来会有很大的___。(Practicing half an hour every day, after a year there will be great progress.)

explanation.en: 「感兴趣」(gǎn xìngqù) means "to be interested in".

questions.prompt: 我对摄影很感___，想多学一些技巧。(I'm very interested in photography, I want to learn more techniques.)
虽然我不是专业的，但我___做一些简单的甜点。(Although I'm not a professional, I know how to make some simple desserts.)

explanation.en: 「让」(ràng) means "to make/let [someone do something]", used causatively.

questions.prompt: 练习书法___我静下心来，也让我很有成就感。(Practicing calligraphy lets me calm down, and also gives me a sense of accomplishment.)

explanation.en: 「让」causatively links the hobby to the resulting happiness.

questions.prompt: 这个爱好虽然花钱，但是___我很开心。(This hobby costs money, but it makes me very happy.)
我打算___学一门新的语言，比如西班牙语。(I plan to try learning a new language, such as Spanish.)
学习一项新技能不容易，但是坚持下来会有___的。(Learning a new skill isn't easy, but persisting will pay off.)

explanation.en: 「了」must come right after the verb 学 (learn), not before it: 学了 (not 了学).
explanation.ko: 「了」는 동사 '学' 바로 뒤에 와야 하며 앞에 올 수 없으므로 '学了'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 我会弹钢琴，已经了学五年。(I know how to play the piano, I've been learning for five years.) — find the error
choices: 我会弹钢琴，已经学了五年了。
我会弹钢琴，已经了学五年。
我会弹钢琴，学了已经五年。
我会弹钢琴，已经学五年了。

explanation.en: 「没有」(negation) must come before the verb 放弃 (give up): 没有放弃 (not 放弃没有).
explanation.ko: 「没有」는 동사 '放弃' 앞에 와야 하므로 '没有放弃'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 虽然一开始很难，但是我放弃没有，一直在坚持。(Although it was hard at first, I didn't give up.) — find the error
choices: 虽然一开始很难，但是我没有放弃，一直在坚持。
虽然一开始很难，但是我放弃没有，一直在坚持。
虽然一开始很难，但是没有我放弃，一直在坚持。
虽然一开始很难，但是我一直没有放弃坚持在。

explanation.en: In the causative 让 structure, the object (我) must come right after 让, before the resulting state: 让我很开心 (not 让很开心我).
explanation.ko: 사역 구문 '让'에서는 목적어(我)가 '让' 바로 뒤, 결과 상태 앞에 와야 하므로 '让我很开心'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这个爱好让很开心我。(This hobby makes me very happy.) — find the error

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 我会弹钢琴，已经学了五年了 ("I know how to play the piano, I've been learning for five years").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '我会弹钢琴，已经学了五年了' (나는 피아노를 칠 줄 알고 벌써 5년째 배우고 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 我会弹钢琴，__________。(I know how to play the piano, I've been learning for five years.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这个爱好让我很开心 ("This hobby makes me very happy").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这个爱好让我很开心' (이 취미는 나를 매우 행복하게 한다)이 된다.

questions.prompt: 这个爱好__________很开心。(This hobby makes me very happy.)
